title: ALL U NEED
description:
A Quality of Life and optimisation modpack 
that enhances the survival experience while staying 100% vanilla.
body:
# ALL U NEED! ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23281287c71f3e3bcd07a0e75110a728251f989e.png)
This modpack is a collection of my favourite optimization, utility and quality of life mods.
It is ment for all general use cases but prioritizes vanilla survival gameplay.
## INCLUDED MODS:
[OPTIMIZATION AND UTILITY]
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Fast Chest](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastchest)
- [Ferrit Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Force Close Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/forcecloseworldloadingscreen)
- [Hide The Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/hide-players)
- [Loading Window](https://modrinth.com/mod/loading-window)
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight)
- [MiniHUD](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minihud)


 [QUALITY OF LIFE]
- [Boat Item View](https://modrinth.com/mod/boat-item-view/version/1.20.x-0.0.5-fabric)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [Clear Enchanting](https://modrinth.com/mod/clear-enchanting)
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders)
- [Effect Timer Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/effecttimerplus)
- [Elytra Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytratime)
- [Elytra Bugfix](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytrabugfix)
- [Map.png](https://modrinth.com/mod/map.png)
- [Map Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-tooltip)
- [microDurability](https://modrinth.com/mod/microdurability)
- [Model Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)
- [Toast Killer](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-open-sauce-toast-killer)
- [Projectile Ding](https://modrinth.com/mod/projectile-ding)
- [Screenshot to Clipboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-to-clipboard)
- [Simple Shulker Preview](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-shulker-preview)
- [Sneak Tweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/sneak-tweak)
- [Third Person Maps](https://modrinth.com/mod/third-person-maps)
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)


[DECORATIVE]
- [Bounced](https://modrinth.com/mod/bounced)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
